# Common TCP ports, ordered most-common-first (curated frequency ranking, in the
# spirit of nmap's top-ports). Used by `ns-discover --top-ports N` (takes the
# first N) and as the portscan palier's default breadth (--ports-deep empty).
# One port per line; # comments and blank lines ignored.
